details.note: Replaced all raw ipcRenderer.invoke() with typedInvoke() and ipcRenderer.send() with typedSend() from ipc-contract. Kept ipcRenderer.on() for listener-based methods. Added import of typedInvoke, typedSend, safeInvoke.
Fixed openPath return type from Promise<void> to Promise<string | void> to match ipc-contract's OPEN_PATH contract entry. Pre-existing mismatch exposed by typedInvoke returning precise types.
